about.page_description: Discover the story behind Wan2Fit: a workout player born from frustration with timer setup, now a complete friction-free training tool.
about.heading: Why Wan2Fit?
about.p1: It all started with a silly problem: I was spending more time configuring timers than actually working out.
about.p2: Work time, rest time, number of sets, exercise order… No app would just let me launch a session and follow the pace without overthinking it.
about.p3: So I built my own player. A tool that handles the timer and transitions for me. That tells me what to do and when. Nothing more.
about.p4: That player is the heart of Wan2Fit. Around it, I've added varied formats, structured multi-week programs, and an AI assistant capable of creating custom sessions.
about.p5: The idea has been the same from day one: less friction, more training.
about.contact: A question or suggestion? Write to me at

premium.page_description: Go Premium: custom AI sessions and personalized programs to reach your goals.
premium.hero_body: Sessions and programs created just for you by artificial intelligence, tailored to your level, preferences, and progress.

ai_sessions.label: AI Sessions
ai_sessions.body: Choose your target muscles, preferred format, and duration — AI builds a complete session in seconds.
ai_sessions.bullet_1: 3 creation modes: quick, detailed, or expert
ai_sessions.bullet_2: Regenerate as many times as you want
ai_sessions.bullet_3: Adapted to your level and goals

ai_programs.label: AI Programs
ai_programs.body: Set your goal, level, and availability — AI generates a structured program over several weeks with built-in progression.
